title: Air Fryer Chicken Thighs
description: Bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs with impossibly crispy skin and juicy meat. The air fryer does what ovens can't - fast, even crisping without drying out the meat.
steps: Pat chicken thighs completely dry with paper towels. This is crucial for crispy skin.
Mix garlic powder, paprika, onion powder, thyme, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
Rub chicken with olive oil, then coat generously with spice mixture on all sides.
Place chicken skin-side down in air fryer basket. Don't overcrowd - cook in batches if needed.
Flip chicken skin-side up. Increase to 400°F (200°C) and cook 12-15 more minutes until skin is golden and crispy, and internal temp reaches 165°F.
notes: Starting skin-side down renders the fat, then flipping crisps it up.
Don't skip the drying step - wet skin = soggy skin.
Thighs are forgiving - they stay juicy even if slightly overcooked.
